title: La bella Lola
writer: Alexandre Dumas fils, Jesús María de Arozamena, Miguel Cussó
actors: Sara Montiel, Antonio Cifariello, Frank Villard
plot: La Bella Lola is a struggling singer trying to make a living for herself and her sister Ana in late-19th-century Spain. She falls in love with a high-society young man but his family refuses to accept her.
